name: commit
description: Safe git operations within workspace_focus. Supports init, add, commit, status, log, diff, branch, checkout, config, and push with authorization gating.

command.description: Git command to execute: init, add, commit, status, log, diff, branch, checkout, config, push

path.description: Path within workspace_focus (for add, diff, init) or direct path for init.

limit.description: Number of commits to show (for log command, default 10).

branch.description: Branch name to checkout (for checkout command).

key.description: Config key to set (for config command).

force_confirm.description: Must be true to authorize push (for push command).
